Author: Brevis
Title: I Tried Every AI Code Generator So You Don’t Have To — Here’s the Best
Text:
Member-only story
I Tried Every AI Code Generator So You Don’t Have To — Here’s the Best
Developer’s no-BS guide to AI coding tools.
I’ll admit it: when AI coding assistants first exploded, I was skeptical.
“Great,” I thought, “another buzzword-driven tool that promises to replace me while actually slowing me down.”
But curiosity (and a stubborn bug I couldn’t fix) made me cave in. I downloaded one.
Then another. Then all of them. Before I knew it, I had turned myself into a guinea pig for every AI code generator worth mentioning.
Spoiler: most of them are flashy autocomplete machines pretending to be your co-pilot.
Some are genuinely useful. A few are dangerously misleading.
And one — yes, only one — actually felt like a game changer. Let’s break it down.
The Criteria That Actually Matter
Forget marketing fluff like “revolutionary AI for developers.” Here’s what really counts:
- Accuracy — Does it actually generate working, bug-free code?
- Context Awareness — Can it understand my project, or is it just a glorified Stack Overflow snippet…
